rag_rules: Preserve the existing AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Place component type annexes in valid component type scopes
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
Use assign only when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or declared auxiliary variable in implementation scope
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
generic_rules: Maintain the authoritative source of component structure from the input AADL model
Preserve existing component names, ports, directions, data types, subcomponents, and connections
Do not encode AADL property associations as AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports or constants
Omit clauses involving event ports in numeric or Boolean comparisons unless the model provides an explicit data value
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use exact Boolean expressions only when the port is an AGREE bool in scope
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports or constants
